description_long: This is a dark-colored, dome-shaped hat with a wide, flat brim encircling the base of the crown. The crown is smoothly rounded and appears to be constructed from a stiff material, giving it a structured silhouette. The brim is relatively thin and flat, extending outward evenly from the crown, and there is a subtle band or ribbon detail running around the base of the crown. The surface of the hat is matte with a slight texture, suggesting it is made from felt or a similar fabric. There are no visible decorative elements or logos, giving the hat a classic and understated appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of a traditional bowler hat, commonly seen in urban settings.
description: A dark, dome-crowned hat with a wide, flat brim and a subtle band around the base, resembling a classic bowler hat.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full circular brim and the rounded dome crown.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical, smooth dome and the even width of the brim.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the brim and crown shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous band and the uniform curvature of the crown and brim.
